response.justification: Bogdan exhibits extensive fullstack development experience with deep expertise in TypeScript, React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL-alternatives like MongoDB. His background in renewable energy-adjacent projects (GISCollective) and pragmatic architecture aligns closely with the role's needs. While his seniority exceeds entry-level, his adaptability and focus on scalable solutions compensate. The career gap is minor given his recent high-impact roles.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and web architecture experience across multiple domains (e.g., GISCollective, Optilyz)
Proven ability to integrate diverse systems (CRM, automation tools) with scalable tech stacks (React, Nest.js alternatives)
Demonstrated interest in clean architecture and collaboration (e.g., TDD, CI/CD at RIDE Capital)
concerns: Overqualified for junior/mid-level role due to extensive senior experience (10+ years)
Limited direct PostgreSQL experience (though SQL proficiency is evident)
Recent career gap may require validation of current technical readiness
